message:
fix(ci): use line-tables-only debug info to prevent linker SIGBUS on Ubuntu

With debug=true (full DWARF), each test binary is ~500MB and the 40+
test crates exceed the 49GB available on ubuntu-latest runners.  The
linker (rust-lld) receives SIGBUS when writing to a memory-mapped
output file on a full filesystem.

CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=line-tables-only reduces binary sizes by ~70%
while preserving file:line backtraces.  Coverage (llvm-cov) uses LLVM
instrumentation and is unaffected by DWARF level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
